/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib CMakeFiles/enttecwing_test.dir/enttecwing_test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enttecwing_test.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enttecwing_test.dir/playbackwing_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enttecwing_test.dir/programwing_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enttecwing_test.dir/shortcutwing_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enttecwing_test.dir/wing_test.cpp.o -o enttecwing_test.app/Contents/MacOS/enttecwing_test -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/filipolszewski/Documents/qlc projekty/qlcplus/plugins/enttecwing/src" /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtTest.framework/QtTest ../src/libenttecwing.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtNetwork.framework/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
